titlestmt.titleproper: Guide to the Yale School of Music Concert Programs
Yale School of Music Concert Programs
titlestmt.author: compiled by Daniel Hartwig

maintenanceevent.eventdescription: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on Thursday January 23, 2020 at 10:13
Finding aid revision description not supplied.

did.unittitle: Yale School of Music concert programs
did.abstract: The materials consist of programs from Yale School of Music student and faculty recitals and professional concerts held in Woolsey Hall and Sprague Memorial Hall.

odd.head: General note
odd.p: Forms part of Yale Record Group 28-E (YRG 28-E), Records of departments, offices, programs, and projects of the Yale School of Music.

accessrestrict.head: Conditions Governing Access
accessrestrict.p: The materials are open for research.

prefercite.head: Preferred Citation
prefercite.p: Yale School of Music Concert Programs (RU 461). Manuscripts and Archives, Yale University Library.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: The materials consist of programs from Yale School of Music student and faculty recitals and professional concerts held in Woolsey Hall and Sprague Memorial Hall.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Note: "Woolsey Hall Concert" folders include Woolsey Hall Concert Series programs, in addition to other programs. New Haven Symphony programs were removed because Manuscripts and Archives already has bound copies
